title: Google finally gives Gemini a cheaper AI model that actually outperforms competitors
excerpt: Gemini 3.6 Flash, 3.5 Flash Cyber, and 3.5 Flash-Lite promise to make AI more efficient and cost-effective.
content_html:
Published Jul 21, 2026, 3:39 PM EDT

Sara Heritage is a tech and gaming journalist, who's currently making her way up to Master Ball rank in Pokemon Champions. Bylines in IGN, GAMINGbible, The Gamer and more. You can usually find her tinkering with tech, or restoring old consoles, always with one of her 3 cats nearby. Come and talk with her over on Twitter @SHeritageJourno.

Summary

  • Google launched three Gemini Flash models focused on speed, efficiency and lower token costs.
  • Gemini 3.6 Flash , is cheaper per task, and boosts coding and research accuracy.
  • 3.5 Flash Cyber is government/partner-only for bug hunting; 3.5 Flash‑Lite is the fastest, cheapest for quick agent tasks.

Alphabet just dropped three new Google Gemini AI models: 3.5 Flash Cyber, 3.5 Flash-Lite, and 3.6 Flash. These models are all about making Gemini faster, cheaper, and more efficient—and come with the added bonus of saving you a little bit of cash on your token use. Neat!

Breaking down each new Gemini Model

What you need to know about Gemini 3.6 Flash, 3.5 Flash Cyber and 3.5 Flash-Lite

Gemini 3.5 Flash Cyber is built to spot and fix software bugs, but for now, only governments and trusted partners get to play with it. It’s cheaper per token than the bigger models, and could help Google catch up to Anthropic’s Mythos in the cybersecurity race.​

Gemini 3.5 Flash-Lite is the fastest and cheapest of the 3.5 crew, designed to handle many quick tasks simultaneously within larger AI agent systems.

But Gemini 3.6 Flash is the most efficient model, using up to 17% fewer tokens and costing less per token than before. Google says it’s cheaper per task than GPT-5.6 Terra Max, Kimi K3, and Qwen 3.7 Max.

It’s better at coding, handling different types of data, and knowledge work than before, too. Finance teams can process documents faster, retailers can manage catalogs and customer support at lower cost, and healthcare researchers can crunch big datasets without blowing the budget. It’s more precise too, making fewer mistakes in code edits (49% vs 37% on DeepSWE) and doing better in machine learning research (63.9% vs 49.7% on MLE Bench). Basically, it’s just better at real-world coding and research tasks.

If you didn’t know, DeepSWE is a benchmark that evaluates the accuracy of AI models’ code edits for software engineering tasks, while MLE Bench tests model performance on various machine learning research activities, such as code generation and problem-solving.

So what’s next for Gemini?

Little has been officially confirmed about Google’s next flagship Gemini model.

​Gemini 3.5 Pro is still in testing with partners, but should be out soon and available to all. Meanwhile, Google’s already hard at work on Gemini 4, and they sound pretty hyped about it.

We don't know much officially about Gemini 4, and it’s allegedly been delayed from internal timelines. Early leaks say it’ll be smarter, handle bigger chunks of info, and mix text, images, audio, and video all in one go. It should also be faster, more efficient, and more secure. Google is also allegedly working on a special chip to run Gemini up to 10 times more efficiently, all to make AI cheaper to use, which Gemini 4 is all-but-guaranteed to use.

content_html_zh:
发布于 2026 年 7 月 21 日下午 3:39（美国东部时间）

Sara Heritage 是一名科技和游戏记者，目前正在《口袋妖怪冠军》中晋升为大师球级别。 IGN、GAMINGbible、The Gamer 等的署名。 你通常会发现她在摆弄技术，或者修复旧游戏机，身边总是带着她的 3 只猫中的一只。 欢迎通过 Twitter @SHeritageJourno 与她交谈。

概括

  • 谷歌推出了三款 Gemini Flash 模型，专注于速度、效率和更低的代币成本。
  • Gemini 3.6 Flash，每项任务的成本更低，并且提高了编码和研究的准确性。
  • 3.5 Flash Cyber​​ 仅供政府/合作伙伴用于漏洞搜寻； 3.5 Flash‑Lite 对于快速代理任务来说速度最快、成本最低。

Alphabet 刚刚发布了三款新的 Google Gemini AI 模型：3.5 Flash Cyber​​、3.5 Flash-Lite 和 3.6 Flash。 这些模型都是为了让 Gemini 更快、更便宜、更高效，并且还可以在代币使用上为您节省一点现金。 整洁的！

分解每个新的双子座模型

关于 Gemini 3.6 Flash、3.5 Flash Cyber​​ 和 3.5 Flash-Lite 您需要了解的信息

Gemini 3.5 Flash Cyber​​ 旨在发现和修复软件错误，但目前只有政府和值得信赖的合作伙伴可以使用它。 它的每个代币比更大的模型更便宜，并且可以帮助谷歌在网络安全竞赛中赶上 Anthropic 的神话。

Gemini 3.5 Flash-Lite 是 3.5 组中最快且最便宜的，旨在在更大的 AI 代理系统中同时处理许多快速任务。

但 Gemini 3.6 Flash 是最高效的模型，与以前相比，使用的代币减少了 17%，每个代币的成本也更低。 谷歌表示，它的每项任务比 GPT-5.6 Terra Max、Kimi K3 和 Qwen 3.7 Max 更便宜。

它在编码、处理不同类型的数据和知识工作方面也比以前更好。 财务团队可以更快地处理文档，零售商可以以更低的成本管理目录和客户支持，医疗保健研究人员可以在不超出预算的情况下处理大型数据集。 它也更精确，代码编辑错误更少（DeepSWE 上为 49% vs 37%），并且在机器学习研究方面做得更好（MLE Bench 上为 63.9% vs 49.7%）。 基本上，它只是更擅长现实世界的编码和研究任务。

如果您不知道，DeepSWE 是一个基准测试，用于评估 AI 模型在软件工程任务中代码编辑的准确性，而 MLE Bench 则测试模型在各种机器学习研究活动（例如代码生成和问题解决）中的性能。

那么双子座的下一步是什么？

关于谷歌下一代旗舰 Gemini 型号的官方消息还没有得到证实。

Gemini 3.5 Pro 仍在与合作伙伴进行测试，但应该很快就会发布并提供给所有人。 与此同时，谷歌已经在 Gemini 4 上努力工作，而且他们听起来对此相当大肆宣传。

我们对 Gemini 4 的官方了解不多，据称它比内部时间表有所延迟。 早期泄露的消息称，它将变得更加智能，可以处理更大的信息块，并且可以一次性混合文本、图像、音频和视频。 它还应该更快、更高效、更安全。 据称，谷歌还在开发一种特殊芯片，可以将 Gemini 的运行效率提高 10 倍，所有这些都是为了降低 AI 的使用成本，而 Gemini 4 几乎肯定会使用该芯片。
